title: A song of ascents. Of David.

verses.1: My heart is not proud, O LORD, my eyes are not haughty. I do not aspire to great things or matters too lofty for me.
verses.2: Surely I have stilled and quieted my soul; like a weaned child with his mother, like a weaned child is my soul within me.
verses.3: O Israel, put your hope in the LORD, both now and forevermore.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
